title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. balearica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. balearica, commonly known as Balearic kidney vetch or Balearic vulneraria, is a subspecies of perennial legume in the genus Anthyllis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The anthocyanins present in Balearic kidney vetch have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against oxidative stress. Balearic kidney vetch can be prepared as a tea or used as a tincture, and it is also used in the production of herbal supplements and infusions.
